title: Tally
summary: Tally Education — the only authorized entity to issue Tally certifications. Industry-recognized accounting software training.

title: IELTS
summary: International English Language Testing System preparation for students planning higher education or career opportunities abroad.

title: SWAYAM
summary: SWAYAM is a programme initiated by Government of India to achieve access, equity and quality in education through online courses from best teaching faculty.

title: MOOCs
summary: Massive Open Online Courses — free online courses from top universities covering a wide range of subjects.

title: National Digital Library
summary: National Digital Library of India — a virtual repository of learning resources with a single-window search facility.
